user_prompt: User is asking about cancellation. Walk them through the cancel flow without being defensive.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM  
Category: Billing - Account Cancellation  

Draft response:  

Hi there,  

I can certainly help you with that. We're sorry to see you go, but I want to make the cancellation process as easy and straightforward as possible for you. 

Here are the quick steps to cancel your account right from your dashboard:

1. Log in to your account and navigate to your **Account Settings** (the gear icon in the top right corner).
2. Select the **Billing** tab from the left-hand menu.
3. Scroll down to the bottom of the page and click the **Cancel Subscription** button.
4. Follow the brief on-screen prompts to confirm your cancellation.

Once you cancel, you will still have full access to your account until the end of your current billing cycle, and you won't be charged again. 

If you run into any issues or would prefer I handle this for you on my end, just reply to this email and I'll take care of it immediately. 

Thank you for giving us a try, and we wish you all the best!

Best,  
Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket and draft a professional, empathetic response walking the user through the cancellation process.
